description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a bright red background and prominent white Coca-Cola branding, including the classic script logo and the word 'Coke' in bold letters. The can features a silver pull-tab top and a slightly indented base, typical of carbonated beverage containers. The surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the label wraps seamlessly around the can, with nutritional information and a barcode visible on the back. The can's design is instantly recognizable, with white wave graphics and detailed product information printed in small white text. The overall appearance is clean, undamaged, and typical of a standard 12 fl oz soft drink can. The can is sealed, with no visible contents or signs of use.
description: A glossy red aluminum can with white Coca-Cola branding, silver pull-tab top, and detailed product labeling. The can is clean, undamaged, and features classic design elements.
description_view_0: The can displays a partial 'Coke' logo in bold white letters on a red background, with the silver pull-tab top clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full 'Coca-Cola' script logo and the iconic white wave design, with the can's curvature accentuating the branding.
description_view_2: The back of the can shows the Coca-Cola logo, nutritional information, barcode, and '12 FL OZ' text, with less prominent branding.
description_view_3: The can features the large 'Coke' text in white, with a portion of the product information and barcode visible on the side.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo, 'Coke' text, barcode, nutritional information, and '12 FL OZ' in white on a red background; classic branding style with wave graphics.
